suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update test baseline from '847 tests must pass at all times (826 system + 21 prototype)' to '859 tests must pass at all times (838 system + 21 prototype)'. The misc-m3-cleanup feature added 12 new tests (10 boundary-case scroll tests, 1 SVG leading-decimal test, 1 renamed SVG icon test).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-m3-cleanup added 12 new tests as part of strengthening scroll test assertions and adding SVG parser coverage. System test count increased from 826 to 838. Total: 838 + 21 = 859.

rejectedObservations.reason: Extremely unlikely edge case in SVG parsing. Not worth documenting as a known issue — it's an acceptable leniency for a minimal SVG parser.
